prompt: Wide-angle architectural photography. A towering, impossibly tall brutalist concrete monument reaching up into the sky. The global shape of the entire monument is a sharp, upward-pointing triangle soaring into the clouds. However, every single individual concrete block, window, and structural beam that makes up the building is angled sharply downward toward the ground at a 45-degree angle. The local downward sloping blocks impossibly construct an upward-reaching tower. Uncanny, mind-bending impossible geometry, photorealistic, 8k. --no text, no charts, no Escher drawings, no illustrations
visual_logic: Every individual structural beam visibly slopes downward toward the ground, yet their collective arrangement impossibly constructs a towering monument thrusting upward. Local downward trends create a global upward trend.
